summary: Performance Tracker UI redesign from glass-morphism/gradient to Swiss/high-contrast design verified successfully. All 14 features tested and passed. Design changes confirmed: large text (text-2xl/3xl = 30px), colored dots for pipeline status (not hyperlinks), flat white cards with slate borders, no gradients/backdrop-blur, block CTA for Leads Targeting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracker UI redesign complete. Swiss/high-contrast design verified: 1) Summary tiles use text-2xl/3xl (30px), 2) Pipeline status shows colored dots (yellow=contacted, blue=new, green=qualified) NOT hyperlinks, 3) All cards use white bg with slate-200 borders, 4) No gradients/backdrop-blur in tracker container, 5) Leads Targeting is a block CTA (div) not hyperlink, 6) KPI cards show large text values.

Test_1_Page_Loads.description: Performance Tracker page loads at /performance with new design

Test_2_Summary_Tiles_Swiss_Grid.description: Summary tiles row shows 7 metrics (Target, Revenue, Existing A/C, New A/C, Pipeline, Outstanding, Activities) in Swiss grid layout with large text values (text-2xl/3xl = 30px)

Test_3_Pipeline_Colored_Dots.description: Pipeline status table shows colored dots (yellow=contacted, blue=new, green=qualified) NOT hyperlinks. Text color is slate-900, text-decoration: none

Test_4_Pipeline_Rows_Clickable.description: Pipeline status rows are clickable and navigate to /leads with correct params (status, assigned_to)

Test_5_Leads_Targeting_Block_CTA.description: Leads Targeting Next Month is a block CTA (div element, not hyperlink) with cursor:pointer, navigates to /leads with target_closure_month, target_closure_year, assigned_to params

Test_6_Revenue_Overridable_Rows.description: Revenue section shows 3 overridable rows (lifetime, this_month, new_accounts) with edit/save/reset icons

Test_7_Account_Metrics.description: Account Metrics section shows existing accounts (with expand button) and new accounts tiles

Test_8_Activity_Metrics.description: Activity Metrics section shows all 8 activity counters (Messages, Calls, Customer Visits, Emails + 4 unique counters)

Test_10_KPI_Cards.description: KPI cards show Achievement %, Pipeline Coverage, Outstanding Ratio, Conversion Rate with large text (30px font-size)

Test_11_Support_Section.description: Support Needed section shows 6 category chips (Pricing, Logistics, Marketing, Collections, Management Intervention, Product/Supply Support) and remarks textarea

Test_13_Generate_Without_Plan.description: Generate button works without a plan selected (Target shows ₹0)

Test_14_Design_Verification.description: No gradients, no backdrop-blur, no purple/blue gradient colors in Performance Tracker container. 19 white background cards, 53 slate border elements. Summary cards use slate-200 background.
